THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREEN, DAVID GREEN, CAROLINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT XELAN PROP 1, LLC KIHAGI, ANNE $6,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,325.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, ANNE KIHAGI IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NOT A PROPER PARTY. DEFENDANT'S CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
